# v2.0

The 2026 release updates external memory ingestion with deterministic markdown recall fixtures and clearer source labels.

## Breaking Changes

This release includes a breaking change for source configuration: duplicate source names are rejected before indexing starts.

## New Features

New features include per-source recall results, markdown heading preservation, and safer cache rebuild behavior for documentation vaults.

# v1.9

The v1.9 release kept the earlier single-source recall behavior and did not include external documentation ingestion.
